rules.name: Cross-tenant access denial

knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL T9-015-Vendor-Consolidated Control Catalog
knowledgeAssets.summary: The deterministic controls for this package. Enforced as executable rules: VR-017 (the universal AI-execution-boundary / cross-tenant controls). The remaining controls are carried here for traceability; detailed field-vs-literal rule tuning is a follow-up (see the hand-authored T9-001..010 packages for the target).
knowledgeAssets.contentText: VR-001 Approved vendor risk policy | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Approved vendor risk policy | Critical | Vendor Risk Committee. VR-002 Board-approved risk appetite | Corrective | Escalate to Board | Critical | Board. VR-003 Vendor Risk Committee charter | Governance | Require documented compliance: Vendor Risk Committee charter | Critical | Vendor Risk Committee. VR-004 Three lines of defense | Governance | Require documented compliance: Three lines of defense | Critical | Vendor Risk Committee. VR-005 Authority matrix | Governance | Require documented compliance: Authority matrix | Critical | Vendor Risk Committee. VR-006 Segregation of duties | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Segregation of duties | Critical | Vendor Risk Committee. VR-007 Critical-vendor approval authority | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Critical-vendor approval authority | Critical | Vendor Risk Committee. VR-008 Conflict-of-interest disclosure | Governance | Require documented compliance: Conflict-of-interest disclosure | Critical | Vendor Risk Committee. VR-009 Risk acceptance authority | Governance | Require documented compliance: Risk acceptance authority | Critical | Vendor Risk Committee. VR-010 Exception expiry | Governance | Require documented compliance: Exception expiry | High | Vendor Risk Committee. VR-011 Committee quorum | Governance | Require documented compliance: Committee quorum | Critical | Vendor Risk Committee. VR-012 Committee voting integrity | Governance | Require documented compliance: Committee voting integrity | Critical | Vendor Risk Committee. VR-013 Governance action tracking | Governance | Require documented compliance: Governance action tracking | High | Vendor Risk Committee. VR-014 Policy review calendar | Governance | Require documented compliance: Policy review calendar | High | Vendor Risk Committee. VR-015 Vendor governance reporting | Governance | Require documented compliance: Vendor governance reporting | High | Vendor Risk Committee. VR-016 AI approval prohibition | Preventive | Deny AI permission for: AI approval prohibition | Critical | AI Governance. VR-017 Cross-tenant access denial | Preventive | Deny cross-tenant access | Critical | Security. VR-018 Evidence retention | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Evidence retention | Critical | Vendor Risk Committee. VR-019 Audit access | Governance | Require documented compliance: Audit access | Critical | Vendor Risk Committee. VR-020 Delegation expiry | Governance | Require documented compliance: Delegation expiry | High | Vendor Risk Committee. VR-021 Governance escalation | Corrective | Escalate by severity/age | High | Vendor Risk Committee. VR-022 Board reporting | Corrective | Escalate to Board | High | Board. VR-023 Policy attestation | Governance | Require documented compliance: Policy attestation | High | Vendor Risk Committee. VR-024 Independent review | Governance | Require documented compliance: Independent review | High | Vendor Risk Committee. VR-025 Governance recovery | Corrective | Execute recovery/rollback procedure | High | Vendor Risk Committee.
